# subreg Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `login` (String) Subreg API login. Can also be set via SUBREG_LOGIN.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Subreg API password. Can also be set via SUBREG_PASSWORD.
- `wsdl_url` (String) Subreg WSDL URL. Defaults to production WSDL.
